title: Jira Product Discovery official positioning
claim: Atlassian positions Jira Product Discovery as a hub to capture insights, prioritize ideas, build roadmaps, and connect discovery directly to delivery work in Jira.
source_snippet: The product page emphasizes capturing ideas, prioritizing with customer insights, and connecting discovery with Jira delivery.
implication: ProductOS has to preserve the benefit of connected discovery and delivery while adding stronger artifact-level auditability than a linked-tool model alone.
followup_questions: How much lifecycle visibility is still split between idea views and downstream Jira work items?
